home.header_subtitle: Live and day-ahead electricity pricing %@ provided by Energy-Charts.info
home.current_price_detail: The app highlights the active quarter-hour slot.
chart.empty_description: Day-ahead data appears when the provider publishes the next day.
widget.configuration_description: Shows the live Austria spot price as a dial or daily chart.
notifications.daily_body: Day-ahead Austria spot prices are usually available now. Open SpotPrice to see the cheapest time.
notifications.cheapest_body: %@ at %@ is currently the lowest Austria spot price for tomorrow.
errors.api_invalid_response: The API returned an unexpected response.
errors.api_invalid_payload: The API payload did not match the expected format.
errors.notifications_disabled: Notifications are disabled for this app. Please allow alerts in iPhone Settings.
price.day_ahead_unpublished: Tomorrow's market values have not been published yet.
price.notification_enabled_with_slot: Daily reminder at 14:05 Vienna time. Cheapest tomorrow slot: %@.
price.notification_enabled_waiting: Daily reminder at 14:05 Vienna time. Cheapest-slot alert arrives as soon as tomorrow's prices are published.
price.notification_disabled: Enable alerts for next-day publication and the cheapest charging window.
